vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual data. The pots are present, but the biological occupants are either non-existent, dormant, or have suffered total systemic loss.

inventory_reconciliation.P1 (Yellow Pot): Systemic Loss. No visible plant matter.
inventory_reconciliation.P2 (Black Pot): Systemic Loss. No visible plant matter.
inventory_reconciliation.P3 (Black Pot): Systemic Loss. The white rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is absent.
inventory_reconciliation.P4 (Shared with P2): Systemic Loss. No visible plant matter.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor remains, but the substrate is devoid of Pothos foliage.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no signs of Silver Guest.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dry and undisturbed across all containers.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: The presence of white, fragmented debris (likely eggshell shards) in the foreground pot (P3) is noted as a consistent feature across the timeline.

vision_report.temporal_deltas: From EARLIEST to CURRENT, there is zero evidence of growth, senescence, or change in the plant specimens. The environment appears static and devoid of active botanical life.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total failure. There is no photosynthetic activity or plant structure present to evaluate. The environment is effectively a 'dead' setup.
vision_report.anomalies: The consistent presence of white, crystalline or shell-like fragments in the P3 pot is the only non-soil feature. No new introductions or interventions observed.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots contain only soil and, in the case of P3, some inert debris. There is no evidence of the String of Nickels, Mexican Mint, Pothos, or Silver Guest. The system is currently non-functional as a botanical habitat.
